Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every homeowner deserves access to top-quality roofing. That's why we offer flexible financing options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path to protecting your home.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

When a derecho took off half our roof in Evanston, Carbon had us tarped within 3 hours. Their team handled all the insurance paperwork and even coordinated with our historic district committee. The repaired section blends perfectly with our 1920s Tudor.

Marta K.
★★★★★

Our Naperville home needed a roof that could handle heavy snow without constant maintenance. Carbon installed a gorgeous standing seam system that's already survived two Chicago winters flawlessly. The crew was meticulous about protecting our landscaping during installation.

James R.
★★★★★

As property managers for a 12-unit Wicker Park building, we rely on Carbon's quarterly inspections. They caught a small leak in our flat roof before it caused interior damage, saving us thousands. Their after-hours emergency service is a lifesaver.

Aisha T.
★★★★★

After years of ice dams in Arlington Heights, Carbon's heated gutter system solved our problems completely. Their design moves water away from our foundation better than our old setup. The crew even adjusted our downspouts to avoid our prized hydrangeas.

David L.
★★★★★

The pre-purchase inspection on our Logan Square two-flat revealed $8,000 in hidden damage. Carbon's detailed report gave us negotiating power and peace of mind. A year later, we hired them to replace the whole roof - they honored their original quote despite material cost increases.

Sophia M.
★★★★★

When wind tore shingles off our Schaumburg home, Carbon matched our 15-year-old architectural shingles perfectly. The repair took less than two hours and you can't tell where the damage was. Their communication from estimate to completion was excellent.

Carlos V.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified inspectors will thoroughly evaluate your roof and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced crew handles everything — from materials to cleanup — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed project with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Who We Are

A Local Business For Your Local Community

Carbon Roofing is proud to serve our neighbors with honest, quality craftsmanship. We're not just a roofing company — we're your community partner dedicated to keeping homes safe and families protected. Every project we take on reflects our commitment to excellence and the trust our customers place in us.

Our Promise

Why Choose Carbon Roofing

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single project — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every roof we build strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How long does a Chicago roof replacement take?
Most homes take 2-3 days, but historic properties may require 5-7 days for careful detailing. We work around your schedule and Chicago's unpredictable weather.
What roofing materials work best in Chicagoland?
For most homes, we recommend impact-resistant asphalt shingles with ice/water shield. Flat roofs downtown often need modified bitumen, while luxury homes may opt for standing seam metal.
Will you match my historic home's original look?
Absolutely. We've sourced period-appropriate materials for everything from Victorian turrets to Prairie School low-slopes across Evanston and Oak Park.
